text: Hello, I'm experiencing a rather perplexing issue with the application. It seems to crash unexpectedly whenever I try to upload a file, and I'm not entirely sure why this is happening. I've tried restarting my device and reinstalling the app, but nothing seems to work. Can you help me understand what's going wrong? I really need to fix this, as it's becoming quite inconvenient.
I'm really frustrated! The app keeps crashing every time I try to save my work. It’s so annoying!
hey, can't log in. reset password doesn’t work, like no email? what now?
I can't believe my game just crashed again! This is the third time today. I'm really frustrated because I thought everything was fixed after your last update.
I feel so lost right now. Can someone please explain what the exact differences are between the pro and business tiers? It's really important to me.
Could you please clarify the steps needed to access the premium features of my account? I believe I followed the instructions but am still experiencing difficulties.
I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the delay in the delivery of my order. It has surpassed the expected timeframe significantly, and I would appreciate an update on its status.
I canceld my membership last month but still got charged! Please refund that amount.
I am having some issues with my account, but I am not sure what the problem is. Could you please help me figure it out? I can't access certain features, and I'm uncertain why.

I'm really frustrated! I placed my order last week and chose the express shipping option because I needed the items for an event this weekend. However, my package has still not arrived, and your tracking system hasn't updated in over a week. I even checked with my neighbors to see if it was mistakenly delivered to them. Can someone please let me know what's going on? This is unacceptable, especially since I paid extra for faster service!
i was charged for 2 subscriptions but only wanted 1! help me plz. also, it’s realy confusing...
I thought the promotion was still on, but now it says expired. Is that right or am I missing something?
My app won't open, but it says it's running fine. Can you help me figure out what's wrong? It was just working yesterday.
I can't log into my account. The password isn't working.

So, I'm not really sure what happened, but I thought I had updated my email address successfully a few weeks ago, yet I keep getting notifications to my old email, which I can’t access anymore, and I really need to get my account sorted out! I can't believe this is happening. It's super confusing and frustrating because I was under the impression everything was fixed. Can you please help me? I don’t want to lose access to my account.

I recently updated my account information, but I'm still seeing my old address in the system. Could you confirm if the changes were applied? I thought I completed the process correctly, but now I'm uncertain.
